Convert HTML or a URL to PDF, capture sc: Convert HTML or a URL to PDF, capture screenshots, and generate EU e-invoices (Factur-X / ZUGFeRD).
Your PolyDoc API key from dashboard.poly: Your PolyDoc API key from dashboard.polydoc.tech.
Get an API key from the PolyDoc dashboar:
Get an API key from the PolyDoc dashboard (dashboard.polydoc.tech, API Keys). It is sent as Authorization: Bearer <key>.

Turn on **Sandbox** to test against sandbox quota (output is watermarked). Leave it off for production conversions.
Convert HTML, a URL, or a saved template: Convert HTML, a URL, or a saved template to a PDF.
Capture a screenshot of a URL, inline HT: Capture a screenshot of a URL, inline HTML, or a saved template.
Generate a hybrid e-invoice PDF (Factur-: Generate a hybrid e-invoice PDF (Factur-X / ZUGFeRD, EN 16931) from a visual layout plus structured invoice data.
Make a custom API call to a specific end: Effectuer un appel API personnalisé vers un point de terminaison spécifique
The URL, inline HTML, or saved template: The URL, inline HTML, or saved template ID, matching the Source Type above.
Data passed to the Liquid template rende: Data passed to the Liquid template renderer (used only when Source Type is Template).
Pages to include, e.g. \"1-5, 8\". Empty: Pages to include, e.g. "1-5, 8". Empty means all pages.
Generate PDF bookmarks from HTML heading: Generate PDF bookmarks from HTML headings.
Top margin with optional unit, e.g. 10mm: Top margin with optional unit, e.g. 10mm, 1cm, 0.5in.
How the generated file is returned: How the generated file is returned
HTTP PUT presigned URL from your storage: HTTP PUT presigned URL from your storage provider (required for Cloud Storage delivery).
URL the generated file is delivered to (: URL the generated file is delivered to (required for Webhook delivery).
Extra webhook settings merged with the U: Extra webhook settings merged with the URL: async, method, headers, retries, retryDelay, timeout.
Label for logging and analytics (max 30: Label for logging and analytics (max 30 characters).
Raw fields deep-merged into the request: Raw fields deep-merged into the request body for any API option not exposed above (e.g. pdf.watermark, pdf.pdfa, render, request).
Device pixel ratio, e.g. 2 for retina (0: Device pixel ratio, e.g. 2 for retina (0 to 10).
Return the image as a file (default) or: Return the image as a file (default) or as a base64 string.
The hybrid e-invoice standard to embed.
The data granularity profile to validate: The data granularity profile to validate against.
Structured invoice data: number, dates,: Structured invoice data: number, dates, currency, seller, buyer, lines, totals. EN 16931 needs payment terms (or due date), seller taxId for VAT category S, and consistent totals. See docs.polydoc.tech.
Validate PDF/A and e-invoice compliance: Validate PDF/A and e-invoice compliance (returns an error if it fails).
Authorization headers are injected autom: Les en-têtes d'autorisation sont injectés automatiquement depuis votre connexion.
Enable for files like PDFs, images, etc.
Template (render a saved PolyDoc templat: Template (render a saved PolyDoc template by ID)
Cloud Storage (upload to a presigned URL: Cloud Storage (upload to a presigned URL)
Webhook (deliver the file to a URL): Webhook (deliver the file to a URL)
Binary file (write the image to a file): Binary file (write the image to a file)
Base64 (return the image as a base64 str: Base64 (return the image as a base64 string)
